title: Tree-Bott
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Tree-Bott''' was a small aboreal animal native to [[U-Tendik]], a jungle planet colonized by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] refugees. The Tree-Botts were considered ideal hunting game and were valued for their [[Milk/Legends|milk]] and meat. The [[Tetsu Clan]] Rodians known as [[Nok (Rodian)|Nok]] and [[Teeku]] were reputable Tree-Bott herders among their people.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{Mo}}
